# Implementation Slices

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/agentexecutiondesign -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Assignment Lifecycle FSM](assignment-lifecycle-fsm.md)

## P0: Safety And Identity Foundation

- Add daemon ExecutionIdentity helper.
- Key saasplane maps, watchers, and partial body buffers by assignment id.
- Preserve logical task_id as report metadata.
- Add transient retry/backoff for safe/idempotent JSON transport.
- Freeze selected executable and launch PATH into StartRequest.Env and spawn env.

## P1: Public Repo Workspace Materialization

- Promote minimal WorkspacePlan DTO to riido-contracts.
- Persist repo/branch as assignment snapshot fields, not only prompt text.
- Clone public repo/branch before provider start.
- Fail closed for private or unknown repo without token broker.

## P1: Stop Lifecycle Normalization

- Add stop_requested and provider_cancel_requested to assignment FSM.
- Let user stop mutate assignment state before daemon process cancellation.
- Preserve lifecycle.Context graceful/forced authority across actor boundaries.
- Record provider kill result separately from terminal projection.

## P2: Streaming And Approval Plane

- Add server-owned answer_delta coalescer and final_answer result path.
- Promote approval request/decision DTO to contracts.
- Use safe auto-approve allowlist; fail closed for protected surfaces without web approval.

## P3: Resume And Desktop Lifecycle

- Store provider session id as durable assignment event.
- On restart, converge to resume, recovery_fresh_start_required, or failed_recovery.
- Refuse stale PID fallback without daemon identity evidence.
- Run workspace materialization and provider submit outside supervisor actor loop.
